texto: The trend of all knowledge at the present is to specialize, but archaeology has in it all the qualities that call for the wide view of the human race, of its growth from the savage to the civilized, which is seen in all stages of social and religious development.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Margaret Murray sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. A afirmação “The trend of all knowledge at the present is to specialize, but archaeology has in it all the qua…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, growth, view, útil em momentos de termino e view.
